# GodeX

> OpenAI Responses API gateway — translates /v1/responses into upstream Chat Completions API calls so any LLM provider can drive Codex. Built with Bun and TypeScript using the @ahoo-wang/fetcher ecosystem.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](wiki/onboarding/contributor-guide.md): Setup, first PR, codebase patterns, testing
- [Staff Engineer Guide](wiki/onboarding/staff-engineer-guide.md): Architecture, design decisions, system boundaries
- [Executive Guide](wiki/onboarding/executive-guide.md): Capabilities, risks, investment thesis
- [Product Manager Guide](wiki/onboarding/product-manager-guide.md): Features, user journeys, FAQ

## Architecture

- [System Overview](wiki/02-architecture/overview.md): Component model, C4 context, architectural decisions
- [Request Flow](wiki/02-architecture/request-flow.md): Full request lifecycle from HTTP to upstream and back
- [Adapter Pattern](wiki/02-architecture/adapter-pattern.md): Provider abstraction, mapper interfaces, capabilities
- [Stream Pipeline](wiki/02-architecture/stream-pipeline.md): TransformStream stages, SSE encoding, session persistence

## Getting Started

- [Overview](wiki/01-getting-started/overview.md): Prerequisites, installation, first request
- [Installation & Setup](wiki/01-getting-started/installation-setup.md): Config wizard, godex.yaml, env vars, model mapping
- [Quick Reference](wiki/01-getting-started/quick-reference.md): CLI commands, API endpoints, curl examples

## Deep Dive

- [Provider Interface](wiki/03-provider-development/provider-interface.md): How to implement new LLM providers
- [Zhipu Reference](wiki/03-provider-development/zhipu-reference.md): Reference provider implementation walkthrough
- [Message & Tool Mapping](wiki/03-provider-development/message-tool-mapping.md): Input item conversion, tool type mapping
- [Session Store](wiki/04-session-management/session-store.md): Response history storage backends
- [Chain Resolution](wiki/04-session-management/chain-resolution.md): Multi-turn conversation chain traversal
- [Transformers](wiki/05-streaming-pipeline/transformers.md): Stream pipeline transformer stages
- [Stream State](wiki/05-streaming-pipeline/stream-state.md): Accumulation state during streaming
- [Error Hierarchy](wiki/06-error-handling/error-hierarchy.md): GodeXError class hierarchy and HTTP mapping
- [Error Codes](wiki/06-error-handling/error-codes.md): Complete error code reference
- [Config Schema](wiki/07-configuration/config-schema.md): godex.yaml configuration reference
- [CLI Commands](wiki/07-configuration/cli-commands.md): Command-line interface reference
- [Testing Guide](wiki/08-testing/testing-guide.md): Unit, E2E, and live provider tests
- [CI/CD & Publishing](wiki/09-deployment/ci-cd.md): CI pipeline, cross-compilation, npm publishing
